ddls:
CREATE TABLE "emails" (
  "email_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each email */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time when the email was sent or received */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent or received the email */,
  "pc_id" TEXT /* ID of the PC used to send the email */,
  "to" TEXT /* Email addresses of the main recipients */,
  "cc" TEXT /* Email addresses of the carbon copy recipients */,
  "bcc" TEXT /* Email addresses of the blind carbon copy recipients */,
  "from" TEXT /* Email address of the sender */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the email in bytes */,
  "attachments" INTEGER /* Number of attachments included in the email */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the email message */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the email */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category to which the email belongs */,
  "importance" TEXT /* Importance level of the email */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Status indicating if the email has been read */,
  "is_spam" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the email is spam */,
  "is_draft" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the email is a draft */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the email has been deleted */,
  "send_status" TEXT /* Status indicating if the email was sent successfully */,
  "thread_id" TEXT /* ID to group emails in a thread */,
  "source_system" TEXT /* Source system or application from which the email was sent or received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("email_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emails_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES email_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emails_thread_id FOREIGN KEY ("thread_id") REFERENCES email_threads ("thread_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emails_pc_id FOREIGN KEY ("pc_id") REFERENCES pcs ("pc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email_address" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the organization */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department in which the user works */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or job title of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pcs" (
  "pc_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each PC */,
  "pc_name" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the PC */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the PC is used */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the PC */,
  "mac_address" TEXT /* MAC address of the PC */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* Operating system version of the PC */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last use of the PC */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the PC */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "email_id" TEXT /* ID of the email that includes this attachment */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the attachment file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the attachment in bytes */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the attachment was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the attachment file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path where the attachment is stored */,
  "is_encrypted" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the attachment is encrypted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the attachment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the attachment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attachments_email_id FOREIGN KEY ("email_id") REFERENCES emails ("email_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "email_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "email_id" TEXT /* ID of the email related to this log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action performed */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to perform the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to perform the action */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_logs_email_id FOREIGN KEY ("email_id") REFERENCES emails ("email_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with this role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "email_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color code for the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "email_recipients" (
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipient */,
  "email_id" TEXT /* ID of the email */,
  "recipient_email" TEXT /* Email address of the recipient */,
  "recipient_type" TEXT /* Type of recipient */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the recipient */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recipient was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recipient information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_recipients_email_id FOREIGN KEY ("email_id") REFERENCES emails ("email_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "email_threads" (
  "thread_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each thread */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the thread */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the thread was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the thread was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("thread_id")
)
